title: IEP Goal Generator
description: Draft measurable SMART IEP goal options from baseline data.
template: Create 2-3 measurable SMART IEP goal drafts for {gradeLevel} in {skillArea} over {targetTimeframe}, using this current baseline information: {currentBaseline}. Each goal should clearly include condition, behavior, and criterion, and be practical for progress monitoring. Never use a real student's name — write [Student] instead. This is a draft that requires review and approval by the full IEP team; do not make eligibility, placement, or disciplinary determinations.
grounding: [PLACEHOLDER — replace with district goal-writing rubric] High-quality SMART IEP goals explicitly state the condition under which the skill is performed, the observable behavior expected, and the measurable criterion for mastery. Goals should be quantifiable, tied to a clear timeframe, and directly referenced to the student's baseline data so progress can be monitored objectively.

fields.label: Current baseline
fields.placeholder: Describe current performance (no student names or identifying details).

fields.label: Target timeframe
fields.placeholder: e.g., by annual review in 36 instructional weeks
